[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100010 2
1 0101010 3
2 0000111 3
3 1011000 3
4 1101111 6
5 0011010 3
6 1010110 4
7 1111010 5

01 10 1111111 a
12 21 1011110 5
23 32 1111110 6
34 43 1111010 5 match 7
45 54 0111010 4
56 65 0101111 5
67 76 1011111 6
70 07 1111111 a

02 20 1111111 a
13 31 1111010 5 match 7
24 42 1110110 5
35 53 1111010 5 match 7
46 64 0110111 5
57 75 1111010 5 match 7
60 06 1101111 6 match 4
71 17 1011010 4

36 63 1111111 a

50 05 1101111 6 match 4
61 16 0011111 5
72 27 1011110 5

15 51 0111010 4

37 73 1111010 5 match 7
